qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact if I have account renewal questions that aren't addressed in this FAQ?
qa_pairs.answer: Please send an email to renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca so that we can assist you with your request.

qa_pairs.question: What happens if a faculty member does not renew their account by the deadline?
qa_pairs.answer: Any active account that is not renewed between May 6 and June 9, 2026, will expire and be automatically deactivated after that date. However, accounts can be reactivated at any time, even after they have been deactivated.
